name: Overnight Turkey Chili (No Beans)
recipeIngredient: 3 jalapeno pepper, chopped or 1 tbsp chili powder.
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a crock pot.
2. Cover and cook for 14 to 16 hours at low heat.
Note: Double the recipe to make 8 servings, and freeze extras in single serving portions if desired. Each serving contains approximately 295 calories.
